name: Iter18b — Developer profile shows chart and stats for impronunciable
description: Since vercel/next.js/pull/1 (by @impronunciable) has been analyzed repeatedly in previous test runs, navigating to /developer/impronunciable should show a populated profile with stat cards showing real numbers, a Score History chart with data points, and a reviews table with at least one row.

planSteps.description: Verify the developer profile page loads with a GitHub avatar and @impronunciable username heading
Verify the Total PRs Reviewed stat card shows a number greater than 0
Verify the Avg Score stat card shows a numeric value, not a dash
Verify the Score History section shows a line chart with at least one data point — not the empty-state message 'No data yet'
Verify the reviews table below the chart shows at least one review row with a score and verdict
